creator: mbeis@xs4all.nl
text:
Getting this for quite some time now. In particular the file "htmlxref.cnf" has a checksum mismatch:

===> Fetching all distfiles required by texinfo-6.1.20160425,1 for building
/!\ texinfo-6.1.20160425,1: Makefile warnings, please consider fixing /!\

Please set LICENSE for this port

===>  Found saved configuration for texinfo-6.1.20160425,1
===>   texinfo-6.1.20160425,1 depends on file: /usr/local/sbin/pkg - found
===> Fetching all distfiles required by texinfo-6.1.20160425,1 for building
=> SHA256 Checksum OK for texinfo/6.1.20160425/texinfo-6.1.tar.xz.
=> SHA256 Checksum mismatch for texinfo/6.1.20160425/htmlxref.cnf.
=> SHA256 Checksum OK for texinfo/6.1.20160425/texinfo.tex.
=> SHA256 Checksum OK for texinfo/6.1.20160425/texi2dvi.
===>  Giving up on fetching files:  texinfo/6.1.20160425/htmlxref.cnf 
Make sure the Makefile and distinfo file (/usr/ports/print/texinfo/distinfo)
are up to date.  If you are absolutely sure you want to override this
check, type "make NO_CHECKSUM=yes [other args]".
*** Error code 1
